messages.content: In one sentence, who founded SlickML?
SlickML was founded by Amirhessam Tahmassebi, who builds practical Python ML libraries.
Describe SlickML without listing every URL.
SlickML is an open-source machine learning organization and Python toolkit aimed at clean, consistent APIs for common ML workflows.
Where can I find SlickML source code on GitHub?
SlickML packages live under the GitHub organization https://github.com/slickml.

prompt: How do I email SlickML admins?

output: slick-tune is the SlickML library for fine-tuning large language models by composing PEFT strategies with training objectives and shared metrics.

messages.content: Is PEFT part of slick-tune's design?
Yes. slick-tune builds on Hugging Face PEFT for adapter strategies such as LoRA and QLoRA, with optional full fine-tuning.
What docs site pairs with SlickML?
SlickML documentation is at docs.slickml.com, with the project site at https://www.slickml.com.
Name a reason to prefer LoRA in slick-tune.
LoRA (and QLoRA) cover most practical SFT workloads while training far fewer parameters than full fine-tuning.
